plugin.name: Study Companion
plugin.description: A study companion that reads learning material with OCR and explains concepts through the configured LLM.
plugin.short_description: OCR and concept explanation companion for study sessions.
entries.open_ui.name: Open Study Companion UI
entries.open_ui.description: Return the static UI path for study_companion.
entries.status.name: Study Companion Status
entries.status.description: Return runtime status, dependencies, and recent study interactions.
entries.neko_communication_status.name: Neko Communication Status
entries.neko_communication_status.descri: Return whether real-time neko communication is active.
entries.dependency_status.name: Study OCR Dependency Status
entries.dependency_status.description: Inspect RapidOCR, Tesseract, and capture dependencies used by study_companion.
entries.ocr_snapshot.name: Study OCR Snapshot
entries.ocr_snapshot.description: Run a lightweight OCR snapshot. Phase 1 attempts fullscreen capture and returns diagnostics on failure.
entries.explain_text.name: Explain Study Text
entries.explain_text.description: Explain a concept from supplied text, or use the latest OCR text if text is omitted.
entries.detect_mode_intent.name: Detect Study Mode Intent
entries.detect_mode_intent.description: Detect whether a text snippet contains a study mode switch intent.
entries.set_mode.name: Set Study Mode
entries.set_mode.description: Switch the study companion between companion, interactive, and teaching modes.
entries.install_tesseract.name: Install Tesseract
entries.install_tesseract.description: Install local Tesseract OCR for study_companion and refresh dependency status.
entries.download_rapidocr_models.name: Download RapidOCR Models
entries.download_rapidocr_models.descrip: Download missing RapidOCR model files for the configured study_companion OCR language.
ui.title: Study Companion
reply.empty_input: Please provide text or capture a readable screen first.
ui.placeholder.input: Paste a concept, problem statement, or OCR text here.

ui.status.screen.question: Question
ui.error.missing_question: Please generate or enter a question first.
ui.onboarding.step.mode.label: Step 1
ui.onboarding.step.mode.title: Choose a default mode
ui.onboarding.step.mode.body: Companion, Interactive, and Teaching tune how the study companion responds.
ui.onboarding.step.ocr.label: Step 2

ui.onboarding.step.ocr.body: Use OCR when you want the companion to read the current learning material.
ui.onboarding.step.goal.label: Step 3
ui.onboarding.step.goal.title: Bind a study goal
ui.onboarding.step.goal.body: Review cards, focus sessions, and summaries stay useful when tied to a goal.
ui.diagnosis.ok.title: Ready for study
ui.diagnosis.ok.body: {count} knowledge topics loaded and OCR dependencies are ready.
ui.diagnosis.warning.title: Setup can be improved
ui.diagnosis.warning.body: Check OCR dependencies or load knowledge topics for better study guidance.
ui.diagnosis.error.title: Attention needed
ui.diagnosis.info.title: Waiting for status
ui.diagnosis.info.body: Refresh status to inspect OCR, LLM, and study data.
entries.knowledge_map.name: Study Knowledge Map
entries.knowledge_map.description: Return topics, relationships, mastery, weak topics, and wrong-question summaries for the study knowledge map.
entries.set_knowledge_contribution_opt_i: Enable or disable local opt-in for anonymous study knowledge contribution queueing.
entries.export_notes.name: Export Study Notes
entries.export_notes.description: Export recent study notes as Markdown, PDF, DOCX, or XMind.
ui.quickstart.subtitle: Capture, ask, review, export
entries.memory_card_upsert.name: Save Memory Card
entries.memory_card_upsert.description: Create or update a spaced-repetition memory card.
entries.memory_deck.name: Memory Deck
entries.memory_deck.description: Return memory cards and due review cards.
entries.memory_card_review.name: Review Memory Card
entries.memory_card_review.description: Review a memory card with an FSRS rating.
entries.memory_create_deck.name: Create Memory Deck
entries.memory_create_deck.description: Create a word, passage, formula, or custom memory deck.

entries.memory_list_decks.description: List local memory decks and item counts.
entries.memory_delete_deck.name: Delete Memory Deck
entries.memory_delete_deck.description: Delete a deck and cascade its memory items and reviews.
entries.memory_import_words.name: Import Words
entries.memory_import_words.description: Import word cards from CSV or JSON.
entries.memory_import_passage.name: Import Passage
entries.memory_import_passage.descriptio: Split passage text into paragraph memory items and FSRS cards.
entries.memory_due_reviews.name: Due Memory Reviews
entries.memory_due_reviews.description: Return due reviews sorted by deck and retrievability.
entries.memory_review_item.name: Review Memory Item
entries.memory_review_item.description: Record a memory item review and update its dedicated FSRS card.
entries.memory_recitation_attempt.name: Submit Recitation
entries.memory_recitation_attempt.descri: Diff a passage recitation and record the review.
entries.memory_generate_draft.name: Generate Memory Draft
entries.memory_generate_draft.descriptio: Generate a candidate memory draft without saving it to a deck.
entries.memory_habit_status.name: Memory Habit Bridge Status
entries.memory_habit_status.description: Return whether memory deck habit integration is available.
entries.memory_set_deck_goal.name: Set Memory Deck Goal
entries.memory_set_deck_goal.description: Create or update today's daily goal for a memory deck.
